title: Moonshadow (disambiguation)
content:
'''Moonshadow''' could refer to

*'''''[[Moonshadow (Imperial II-class)|Moonshadow]]''''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]
*'''''[[Moonshadow (Rik Duel's)|Moonshadow]]''''', a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by smuggler [[Rik Duel/Legends|Rik Duel]]

{{Disambig}}
